name: [Holiday Update] via 314
subject: Your uncle said what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Happy Thanksgiving, friend -- so how did it go?

Did any of your family members deny the existence of climate change?

Did anyone at the table deny basic facts backed by hard-scientific evidence?

Did someone say they don't believe in climate change because it's currently cold outside?

If any of these statements were uttered at your Thanksgiving table, you know how critical it is to support organizations like 314 who are working DAY and NIGHT to get scientific-minded Democrats elected at all levels of government.

[Chip in to anger your Republican relatives and support science minded Democrats:](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-novfr?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+to+anger+your+Republican+relativ&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191128_30OP_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_191128_30OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_191128_30OP_1_1") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a very happy Thanksgiving. Thanksgiving is one of my favorite times of year, when all of my family comes together from some relaxation, competitive games, and of course some delicious food. Thanksgiving is a time for all Americans to reflect on what we have and what we must fight to protect. The American Dream has never been more attainable for Americans, with record employment and a booming economy. We have so much to be thankful for this year. While some people (no...not _THAT_ Aunt or Uncle), may try to divide us this Thanksgiving season, let us remember what we are thankful for. It has been the biggest honor of my lifetime to serve as your senator this year. I hope that I have made Hoosiers proud by fighting for our values in Washington and standing strong for what I was elected on. I will continue to fight for you and all Americans. Thank you, and Happy Thanksgiving. Senator Mike Braun |
---|---|---

[mikebraunforindiana.com](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkydlll-kujulhlke-y/)

[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkydlll-kujulhlke-j/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkydlll-kujulhlke-t/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdkydlll-kujulhlke-i/)

but you may [unsubscribe](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jdkydlll-kujulhlke-r/) if you're no longer interested.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Time is running out. I'm counting on you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are still 200 top Trump supporters short of our goal, so I'm hoping I can count on you.

Peter,

I am reaching out to remind you that our fight to win in 2020 will not be easy.

Democrats have proven time and time again that they will do just about anything to get their way. . . Impeachment Plots. Witch Hunts. Blatant Lies.

They will use every dirty trick in the book and spend whatever amount it takes to win. [**We need YOU to join our fight to defeat the radical left in 2020.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53625563:sjT7-LvNq:m:1:1155937413:056B01DE448DFF12C45916DD80530EC4:r)

Our end of month deadline is quickly approaching, and I am worried that we might miss our crucial fundraising goal. [**We only have 1 day until the deadline and I 'm counting on you.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53625563:sjT7-LvNq:m:1:1155937413:056B01DE448DFF12C45916DD80530EC4:r)

**All gifts 3X matched!**

**[$35 ---------------> $105](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53625563:sjT7-LvNq:m:1:1155937413:056B01DE448DFF12C45916DD80530EC4:r)

Winning in 2020 will require the help of ALL grassroots Conservatives. That's why I need you.

**Time is running out! 3X-MATCHING to defend your president ends soon.**

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53625563:sjT7-LvNq:m:1:1155937413:056B01DE448DFF12C45916DD80530EC4:r)

We will never catch up to the Democrats if we don't make this critical fundraising deadline.

[**Step up now! Your 3X-Matched contribution will directly help efforts to take back our Conservative majority. Contribute anything NOW before our FEC deadline!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53625563:sjT7-LvNq:m:1:1155937413:056B01DE448DFF12C45916DD80530EC4:r)

Thank you,
Steve Scalise

body:
I’m fired up!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12350279/126958914/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.29_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI5MWE2Ny1jZDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eBFOkyb9225ifR6nhXdDM4VH-cz04BEGKZ3g8_6VVA=) Hey team,

I know everyone is still winding down from Thanksgiving after spending quality time with family and eating all the amazing food (_I know I am!_), but we were going over our monthly fundraising reports this morning, and **all of the sudden, I’m fired up!**

**I couldn’t wait to share with you that we only need to raise about $5,000 to meet our ambitious monthly grassroots fundraising goal! I know we can do it. **

[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or $25 to help push us over the edge and finish the month off strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12350280/126958915/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.29_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI5MWE2Ny1jZDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eBFOkyb9225ifR6nhXdDM4VH-cz04BEGKZ3g8_6VVA=)

It has been an exciting month here on Team Eugene. _Roll Call_ joined outlets like the _Washington Post_ and _National Journal_ in listing this race one of the top ten most competitive races _in the entire country_. And, in the same vein, _Cook Political Report_ and _Politico_ have both labeled this race a “toss-up”. The country has taken notice of the powerful grassroots movement we’ve built together right here in Pennsylvania.

**But they’re not the only ones who took notice.**

Last week, we told you that a Republican dark money group, is throwing millions of dollars into races across the country -- and that PA-10 is a top priority for them. With all eyes on this district, you can bet this is just the beginning of these special interest groups flooding Scott Perry’s campaign.

Like we’ve said before, **these groups are no match for our network of incredible grassroots supporters just like you, team.** [_**Can you pitch in _right now_ to help us close the gap?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12350281/126958916/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.29_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI5MWE2Ny1jZDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eBFOkyb9225ifR6nhXdDM4VH-cz04BEGKZ3g8_6VVA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Express donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12350282/126958917/480453248?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.29_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI5MWE2Ny1jZDEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eBFOkyb9225ifR6nhXdDM4VH-cz04BEGKZ3g8_6VVA=)

clean_body: I’m fired up! = Hey team, I know everyone is still winding down from Thanksgiving after spending quality time with family and eating all the amazing food (I know I am!), but we were going over our monthly fundraising reports this morning, and all of the sudden, I’m fired up! I couldn’t wait to share with you that we only need to raise about $5,000 to meet our ambitious monthly grassroots fundraising goal! I know we can do it. = It has been an exciting month here on Team Eugene. Roll Call joined outlets like the Washington Post and National Journal in listing this race one of the top ten most competitive races in the entire country. And, in the same vein, Cook Political Report and Politico have both labeled this race a “toss-up”. The country has taken notice of the powerful grassroots movement we’ve built together right here in Pennsylvania. But they’re not the only ones who took notice. Last week, we told you that a Republican dark money group, is throwing millions of dollars into races across the country -- and that PA-10 is a top priority for them. With all eyes on this district, you can bet this is just the beginning of these special interest groups flooding Scott Perry’s campaign. Like we’ve said before, these groups are no match for our network of incredible grassroots supporters just like you, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = = Meeting our goal this month will help us show that the people of PA-10 are ready to take a stand against the Republican special interests bankrolling Scott Perry’s campaign and flip PA-10 blue! Hope you’re as fired up as I am, Rachele Rachele Fortier Campaign Manager Eugene for Congress Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend,

---
Peter --

This is J.D.’s campaign manager. It’s an honor to work with a candidate like J.D. -- because what drives him is his big heart. He cares so much about serving this community and putting everything he’s got into winning this race. That’s why we need you to have our backs and be just as committed as he is.

Running a campaign in a rural Iowa district is not easy. We have a lot of ground to cover.

From gas and maintenance for Sioux City Sue (our campaign vehicle of choice) to hand warmers and cups of coffee for our hard-working volunteers knocking on doors in the cold winter months, we need the resources to keep us running strong.

| Hi there, It's impossible to overemphasize how important our work will be in 2020. Minnesota is a critical battleground state for Donald Trump. His campaign will be spending tens of millions of dollars to flip us red. And just as they've done over the past three years, the MN GOP will defend his divisive message and harmful policies at every chance they get in the hopes of riding his coattails. Hi there,
It's impossible to overemphasize how important our work will be in 2020.
Minnesota is a critical battleground state for Donald Trump. His campaign will be spending _tens of millions_ of dollars to flip us red. And just as they've done over the past three years, the MN GOP will defend his divisive message and harmful policies at every chance they get in the hopes of riding his coattails.
Governor Walz and our campaign are fighting every day to elect a Minnesota Senate Majority that will put Minnesotans first, not echo the dangerous rhetoric of the Trump administration.
Now, we're officially in the home stretch of 2019. We need you with us so we can start the New Year at full capacity and get the job done.
**Our November end-of-month deadline is our first critical test and we still need to raise $3,187 in grassroots contributions to hit our budget target.[Will you make a contribution of $5 or more today to help us make up the difference by MIDNIGHT tomorrow?](https://act.myngp.com/el/SNmRNrdLhwJ0-TkQF3pksckHBOt-CCHz-Hx2epvhvyY=/1C1hjdfrCstKhBo434Yj4EoSV-K0ohhl8ya_XD3OD2s=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

name: Gary
subject: we'll lose our only chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's...
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8b/5721a3ed/71c40dca/efaa79a/3887068797/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

**If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. **That's why this news is so troubling:

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans started funneling millions to defeat me, hell-bent on buying Michigan's Senate seat. **And now, a recent poll shows me winning by just a single point, 44% to 43%.**

**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan.** That's why my team set a goal to raise $35,000 - but right now, our fundraising is falling short, and we're running out of time.

**Friends, our end of month deadline is coming up, and whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

clean_body: If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's... | | | "" Friends, If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's why this news is so troubling: Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans started funneling millions to defeat me, hell-bent on buying Michigan's Senate seat. And now, a recent poll shows me winning by just a single point, 44% to 43%. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. That's why my team set a goal to raise $35,000 - but right now, our fundraising is falling short, and we're running out of time. Friends, our end of month deadline is coming up, and whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so I'm counting on your immediate contribution: "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Gary | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth, and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. | | People always ask me why I chose to work for Nikki -- what about Nikki inspired me to join the team. It's because I know Nikki has what it takes to serve us honorably -- and she has what it takes to win. She's tough, but she's kind and compassionate. She will fight the good fight for people struggling -- and she'll fight hard. Nikki will spend all of her time and energy in Congress making sure she's working for us -- not dark money special interest groups and rich corporate lobbyists. She will fight the good fight for people struggling -- and she'll fight hard. **Nikki will spend all of her time and energy in Congress making sure she 's working for us -- not dark money special interest groups and rich corporate lobbyists.** She'll stand strong against the NRA and Big Pharma -- protecting our health care and our children. We can rely on Nikki to be there for us when it counts -- that's why I think she belongs in Congress. **But getting there against a Republican opponent who has taken millions from corporate PACs means we have a tough fight against us.** And with Nikki rejecting corporate PAC money, we need a little help from people like you giving to emails like this. name: Brad Parscale
subject: I just met with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
He has a request for you. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=554796569bbeb4388aacf725f37ffedf6f4986c90dc83999944b87b345f4a63f23c68ea90d8135ad06e7cec34ed740ab6b8e3a7fbbd00804)
---

Friend,

I just stepped out of a meeting with President Trump to update him on our November fundraising goal.

We went over the most recent list of **November Deadline Donors,** and he noticed your name _STILL_ wasn't on the list.

In a time when Democrats are trying to take down your President and destroy everything he's done for our Nation, your support has never been more critical.
---
|
_That 's why we need YOU to step up._ President Trump asked me to personally reach out to you because you've always been one of his best supporters and he was surprised to see you hadn't contributed yet.

There's only one day left to help us CRUSH our **$2,000,000 November End-of-Month goal.** This goal is so crucial to our success, that President Trump has activated a **TRIPLE-MATCH on all contributions.**

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Working backwards from success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need all hands on deck.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY) Yang Gang --

The clock is ticking.

**We now have less than 48 hours to hit our $2 million goal by the end of November -- and we still have $1,034,955‬ to go.**

Working backwards, if we do hit our goal, we will have had one of the best 48 hours we’ve ever had on this campaign. Think about that -- the next 48 hours could be one of the most prolific fundraising hours of the entire campaign.

[It’s a long shot. But hey, so is this entire campaign. Can you chip in $10 or more and help us make it happen? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=5&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY)
---

---

---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY)

---
Our campaign is funded by the Yang Gang. We have the highest share of grassroots donors of any candidate in this field.

Most campaigns are lucky to get a 1% or 2% donation rate on a typical fundraising email. Our emails perform much better than that because the Yang Gang is an unstoppable force. But we need to up the ante. **If even a third or a quarter of the folks reading this email make a donation of $10 or more, we’ll hit our goal.**

[Pitch in here and let’s crush this goal together. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=7&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY)

Can’t wait to celebrate our success with you tomorrow night,

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18086?t=6&akid=3796%2E377263%2EHMRqoY)

name: Ed Markey
subject: inaction is reprehensible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

As the wildfires burn, seas rise, and storms devastate every corner of the country, Donald Trump and the Republicans have chosen to do nothing.

**Their inaction is reprehensible.**

That's why I'm fighting every day to pass the Green New Deal. We can combat the climate crisis, transform our economy, and launch the greatest jobs program in a generation with the Green New Deal.

**But I need your help in this fight. We 're facing our final November deadline, and we're only 55% of the way to our $30,000 goal.**

_**[Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us close the gap on our goal before tomorrow at midnight? We need to show grassroots Democrats are standing up and ready to fight to save our planet.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $100 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-112919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $250 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-112919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate another amount](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
Since I introduced the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, we have sparked a political revolution in this country that is going to take power from Big Oil and fossil fuel interests and put it back in the hands of the people.

The Green New deal is about putting people, not polluters, at the center of our country's energy policies.

But if we don't have the resources to stay in this fight, we'll be allowing the climate deniers to win and we abandon future generations. We can't let that happen.

_**[That's why reaching our final November goal is so important. We need to send a clear message that the power of this grassroots movement is stronger than ever. Will you pitch in and stand with me?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks,

Ed

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Help combat leftist attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Two weeks ago, I stood up to Adam Schiff and his radical leftist buddies that want to take down our President. | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=6dedbe8ebc4b418684a99d508b051322&_e=4-AgOaB_0D7HKzk768cTQaPpUid5tMnmEd3Xb-a8VTHgmZr8BrM7VuVWYVuMWPwYgZIYbtL8Az0Yjz83biE0JMOP98WeSKgKUd3_TzIIm4zP-TkXe2O5p2vliVVpZ1hc7rRidQDW54G8CSdNBbbgpR1lVF5ylhysY94ULdh8KgQpWSdJ_D4rNSMmumbP-xmniD8wfvmEH-dZK8zlfEvRVqWIrPoTBAcpKYsvM5VF3UN1HGOFwOFMqhuznSsb0T5To9ucOfdnZaL-YdeK2K1ImwF555z84sVdqUiihGJKbptzI_mT9v7oTRy20qGn8FfWU5luSkcg7VeLLBIsU2YFM5y73tbO9jEP5OnsyCeKYmKFUXXM_1NZIckzUw2-XX2OkX-dkPu8WfawkIf0i8nIFkdmjIFUGfT6y8ZjoK6ycNE%3D)
|
---
Hi Peter, it’s Elise Stefanik.

Two weeks ago, I stood up to Adam Schiff and his radical leftist buddies that want to take down our President. Since then, the Hollywood liberal elite has systematically targeted my campaign and helped my opponent raise millions.

But thankfully we’ve seen support for my campaign pour in from across the country. I couldn’t be more grateful for the help from you and people like Claudia Tenney who have chosen to take a stand with me against Adam Schiff and his impeachment sideshow.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click ** BLACK FRIDAY BLACK-OUT OFFER: LIVE Hopefully you've recovered from the turkey, mashed potatoes, stuffing, and pie from yesterday. It's Black Friday, a day known for deals and steals as we head into the holiday season! In honor of the party that is trying to steal jobs, wages, and freedoms from the American people, we're offering you a special deal: black out a Democratic presidential candidate 's average contribution AND unlock 300% matching on donations made through the end of the month. Here's how it works: Below, we've listed out the average donations made to the campaigns of the top five Democratic presidential candidates last quarter. By making a contribution in the same amount, you effectively black out, or cancel, the impact of that liberal donation. This election is in our hands and it's up to us to fight back! We need 250 patriots to take advantage of our Black Friday deal in order to unlock 3X donation-matching on November 30. You don't even have to leave your couch to take advantage of this Black Friday offer - Match Elizabeth Warren 's average donation**** ** Match Joe Biden 's average donation ** ** Match Kamala Harris' average donation ** ** Match Bernie Sanders ' average donation ** ** Match Pete Buttigieg 's average donation ** ** Or unlock 3X matching with a custom amount ** ** Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Folks, Kentucky State Rep. Charles Booker is building a movement to defeat Mitch McConnell. [_**Charles wants to tell you all about it. Click here or on the image below to watch the video that launched a movement! And if you were as inspired by it as we were, chip in whatever you can to support this movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12356534/127020806/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191129_a1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4OGIxZS1lOTEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYYSU3x-2Z4eCW4S-gLl9Y-0Dx89W7qmbH-QqeNqg_8=) _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12356535/127020807/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191129_image&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4OGIxZS1lOTEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYYSU3x-2Z4eCW4S-gLl9Y-0Dx89W7qmbH-QqeNqg_8=)**_ Charles is considering a run for the U.S. Senate because it’s about time someone took a minute to sit down and listen to real Americans. This movement is bigger than one party or politician. It’s about the power of working people. [_**Here’s the link to that video one more time. We hope you take a moment to watch and share it with friends, family, and loved ones who need to know that their voices matter.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12356536/127020808/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191129_a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4OGIxZS1lOTEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYYSU3x-2Z4eCW4S-gLl9Y-0Dx89W7qmbH-QqeNqg_8=) Talk to you soon, Team Charles **[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12356537/127020809/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191129_m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4OGIxZS1lOTEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYYSU3x-2Z4eCW4S-gLl9Y-0Dx89W7qmbH-QqeNqg_8=)** **[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12356538/127020810/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191129_o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4OGIxZS1lOTEyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYYSU3x-2Z4eCW4S-gLl9Y-0Dx89W7qmbH-QqeNqg_8=)** | Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Fiona Hill, Yovanovitch testimony has left White House reeling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | The public live testimony in the impeachment inquiry revealed a shocking amount of corruption and moral degeneracy in the Trump White House. Courageous witnesses like Fiona Hill, Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, and former ambassador Marie Yovanovitch stood up for the truth in the face of Trump's Twitter intimidation, threats, and GOP bullying. They testified to just how extensive the Ukraine scandal is, reaching from Trump to Pence to Pompeo to Giuliani and down. This administration has eviscerated the dedicated civil service in the executive branch, gutted the foreign service, and left our international standing in shambles. These brave witnesses \-- compared with the legion of Trump's cronies that refused to testify, even under subpoena \-- have continued their service by exposing the rot that is festering in our highest office. But we have the chance to do something incredible in 2020. We can take back the White House and the Senate. We can show the brave witnesses that they were right to stand up for the truth and for the America we believe in. [**It 's because of people like you that we can reach hundreds of thousands of voters and motivate them to the ballot box, but we can't stop there. We need to build on this momentum, and we need your support immediately in order to do that. Anything you can give, even just $1, will go a long way toward beating Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all their corrupt enablers. Can you donate today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcea/6e9863e8/16dafb6d/1db0a36c/235951655/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191129a.ND&refcode2=eQOaMKhdg7SiJnFQaYzi") Thank you for standing with us in this fight. We couldn't do it without the amazing support of people like you. name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
body:
We can't do this without you.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f72/4bef7a87/6bb52a05/287ffa6c/153362525/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Hi there -
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request - especially today - is so important.
Our team has an important end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and we've set a goal of raising $150,000 before the clock runs out.
You haven't had a chance to contribute to our campaign yet. I'm hoping you'll take this opportunity to make your first online donation now to bring us one step closer to our goal. What do you say?
[**Make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month deadline hits tomorrow at midnight. I wouldn 't ask if this weren't truly important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f72/4bef7a87/6bb52a05/287ffa63/153362525/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjktMS1uZC1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191129-1-nd-a")
While Susan Collins spends her nights at high-dollar soirees like one hosted by Mitch McConnell, we're running a campaign powered by people who simply want a Senate that puts the needs of working people first.
I know you understand that means your grassroots donation is even more urgent. We can't do this without you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f72/4bef7a87/6bb52a05/287ffa63/153362525/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjktMS1uZC1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191129-1-nd-a")******

Sara Gideon for Maine

body:
Well, team, we're already at the end of November and boy did it fly by. We only have less than 48 hours left to hit our monthly finance goal. As it stands now we're $3,171 short of wher
|
---
| |
---

| | Well, team, we're already at the end of November and boy, did it fly by. We only have less than 48 hours left to hit our monthly finance goal. As it stands now we're $3,171 short of where we need to be by midnight on Saturday. [**Can you help us close the gap with a donation of any size?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8dfb/1927074576/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=15") | [**$5**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df4/1927074576/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5") | **[$35](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df5/1927074576/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=35")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df6/1927074576/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=50")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df7/1927074576/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all?refcode=FILL&amount=100")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df0/1927074576/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=250")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df1/1927074576/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=10")**
**Mike is the best choice to be Iowa 's next senator. Let's go down the list:**
✅He'll protect Medicare and Social Security
✅He'll fight to keep our farmland prosperous and soil healthy
✅He'll take aggressive action on the climate crisis
✅He'll hold powerful people and corporations accountable for their actions
✅He'll put Iowans first
But he needs your help today. We're up against establishment fundraisers, and our only hope of keeping up is by engaging our grassroots team. [**So, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can hit this end-of-month target?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df2/1927074576/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5")
[I can give $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df4/1927074576/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all&amount=5")
---
[I can give more!](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2425/33365068/4a63b5e9/3f8b8df3/1927074576/VEsHBQ/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_jo_b1_all")
---
Democratically yours,
Jordan Overstreet

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Tomorrow is Thanksgiving holiday across our beautiful state and country.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**[_Critical deadline tomorrow!_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---
Peter,
Here at Team Turner headquarters, we have just one more day before the [_**most important fundraising deadline of Mike 's reelection campaign to date! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
On Saturday night at 11:59 PM, we need to surpass our fundraising goal to ensure we will be ahead at a key point this critical election cycle.
This was such an important month. Mike stood tall against Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff during their partisan impeachment agenda that finally was removed from behind closed doors, and out in front of the public for the first time. And now November's end of month deadline is almost here.
It's clear to Mike and us here at Team Turner that Pelosi and Schiff are orchestrating a political campaign against President Trump. One that aims to remove a duly elected president. [_**We can 't allow them to continue this partisan impeachment push! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Do you agree with Mike? [_**If you do please rush in a donation NOW to stop this partisan impeachment process before this Saturday 's 11:59 PM deadline! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Mike needs your help to continue holding Pelosi and Schiff accountable and to continue fighting to preserve Ohio's future before Saturday's deadline.
_**[Donate $150 to hold Pelosi& Schiff accountable>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $100 to hold Pelosi & Schiff accountable>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $75 to hold Pelosi & Schiff accountable>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate $45 to hold Pelosi & Schiff accountable>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Donate Any Amount to hold Pelosi & Schiff accountable>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
2020 is going to be critical to protect the gains we have made under President Trump and GOP leadership! If we don't win here, Ohio is at risk of losing the gains we have made. [_**And Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff will push forward with their agenda that includes items like the Green New Deal and the $32 trillion dollar Medicare for All**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Please help Mike keep fighting for Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio. [_**Donate before tomorrow night 's deadline at 11:59 PM!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Team Turner
**[**DONATE BEFORE SATURDAY 11:59 PM!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---
120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDEyMjU2MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjY1MDkxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b5a/704929dc/16754c57/3993d4be/3169833514/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_template?refcode=dav_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191129_AnnieEOM_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191129_AnnieEOM_U1_X1")

| | Friends, It's Annie, Wendy's campaign manager! Hate to introduce myself like this -- but I'm reaching out because we have just ONE day left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline hits, and we still need to raise $9,928 to meet our goal.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Friends, It's Annie, Wendy's campaign manager! Hate to introduce myself like this -- but I'm reaching out because we have just **ONE** day left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline hits, and we still need to raise $9,928 to meet our goal. **The stakes are higher than ever** \-- our district was named **one of the 18 most competitive** congressional seats in the nation. Texas is a key battleground state for control of the White House, and the GOP can't afford to lose _any_ ground here. **I know Wendy has what it takes to win** \-- she took on an entrenched incumbent in a Texas Senate district drawn to favor a Republican, and _won_. But she can't do it in this race without grassroots supporters like you. [**National Republicans and dark money groups are spending millions in competitive races like ours so they can hold on to power. name: John Jackson, Campaign Manager
subject: Friend...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
Friend,**
**
There are just 2 DAYS remaining before Senator Cornyn's second-to-last major fundraising deadline of the year.
Come December, we'll face the reality that 2020 is just around the corner, whether we like it or not... and we'll NEED to be ready.
We can do things the easy way or the hard way. You take your pick...
**The Easy Way** : we exceed November's End of Month fundraising goal by $10,000 and coast through the end of the year. It'll mean fewer emails for you, and more time to focus on strategy for me.
[**If it 's going to happen, we'll need everyone reading this email to chip in $40.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tb0P2ENvdzk-zkAndA_ts54xgaeiwTbru0fAjX4pHZuv9hkw8rN6AbnVaDijG8P3lA-6eLu38deBJCDGNrXk3XumwyDR9k43vibIAkaqnkfoEC5l8Mo3-HUIVWiL4Bzfx5bnsmYIFfbrccwbSdG4lD0rpAvA0x0CAli6Ee3oip-MMRzPCZuSIDBo9AogLIAq4vcCSUiXoRUGuhPJ4KxnWYfcUHCeZHTMgRgR4ewD7RhPCBLjlB5kTIjfrIST8d9aIyQznKbwQ9COIvCLaIJjVtiw9zsmKYw6Aq6pwh_2kvjicRKXnHViY7Q6M5sKfWQz4ALvJN6Axh49BRtcVZXv-g==&c=I2vB124dNboxdU0ImiJCZ8PqFqXJ-zhl_67iIhXTMEPQzvSZ73Yvjw==&ch=1Sbg1mROtkzEfiyOgwHccxGEGTbEY62cWvI0xSRt5C8luUi1MiC69g==)
**The Hard Way** : If we fall behind on our goals, it will be a sprint to the end of the year - we'll have to use every tool at our disposal to catch up, and we'll lose valuable time in planning for how we'd handle this race if Beto steps in.
**Either way** - this November End of Month deadline is CRITICAL. Meeting our goal will mean setting us up for success in 2020 - [**will you chip in to help us meet our goal?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tb0P2ENvdzk-zkAndA_ts54xgaeiwTbru0fAjX4pHZuv9hkw8rN6AbnVaDijG8P3lA-6eLu38deBJCDGNrXk3XumwyDR9k43vibIAkaqnkfoEC5l8Mo3-HUIVWiL4Bzfx5bnsmYIFfbrccwbSdG4lD0rpAvA0x0CAli6Ee3oip-MMRzPCZuSIDBo9AogLIAq4vcCSUiXoRUGuhPJ4KxnWYfcUHCeZHTMgRgR4ewD7RhPCBLjlB5kTIjfrIST8d9aIyQznKbwQ9COIvCLaIJjVtiw9zsmKYw6Aq6pwh_2kvjicRKXnHViY7Q6M5sKfWQz4ALvJN6Axh7UnoxBJlVqBQ==&c=I2vB124dNboxdU0ImiJCZ8PqFqXJ-zhl_67iIhXTMEPQzvSZ73Yvjw==&ch=1Sbg1mROtkzEfiyOgwHccxGEGTbEY62cWvI0xSRt5C8luUi1MiC69g==)
END OF MONTH STATUS

EMAIL: [$SUBSCRIBER.EMAIL
](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tb0P2ENvdzk-zkAndA_ts54xgaeiwTbru0fAjX4pHZuv9hkw8rN6AbnVaDijG8P3lA-6eLu38deBJCDGNrXk3XumwyDR9k43vibIAkaqnkfoEC5l8Mo3-HUIVWiL4Bzfx5bnsmYIFfbrccwbSdG4lD0rpAvA0x0CAli6Ee3oip-MMRzPCZuSIDBo9AogLIAq4vcCSUiXoRUGuhPJ4KxnWYfcUHCeZHTMgRgR4ewD7RhPCBLjlB5kTIjfrIST8d9aIyQznKbwQ9COIvCLaIJjVtiw9zsmKYw6Aq6pwh_2kvjicRKXnHViY7Q6M5sKfWQz4ALvJN6Axh7e8UKKo8OfJg==&c=I2vB124dNboxdU0ImiJCZ8PqFqXJ-zhl_67iIhXTMEPQzvSZ73Yvjw==&ch=1Sbg1mROtkzEfiyOgwHccxGEGTbEY62cWvI0xSRt5C8luUi1MiC69g==) DONATION STATUS: Missing
TRIPLE MATCH:** ACTIVATED**
Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 1st
---
Friend, there's a real chance Beto O'Rourke jumps into this race.
After two failed bids for Senate and President, Beto has an itch to scratch, and it's more irritating than ever. Odds are that he uses the race for Senate as his final attempt... his announcement could come any day now.
Now, why I mention this is that we have a very strict goal to meet before the end of the year.
If we're forced to respond to a Beto Senate run, it could derail all of the planning we've done.
That's why November's goal is so vital - we never know what could be coming down the pipeline in the next few days. [**WE NEED TO BE PREPARED FOR ANYTHING!** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tb0P2ENvdzk-zkAndA_ts54xgaeiwTbru0fAjX4pHZuv9hkw8rN6AbnVaDijG8P3lA-6eLu38deBJCDGNrXk3XumwyDR9k43vibIAkaqnkfoEC5l8Mo3-HUIVWiL4Bzfx5bnsmYIFfbrccwbSdG4lD0rpAvA0x0CAli6Ee3oip-MMRzPCZuSIDBo9AogLIAq4vcCSUiXoRUGuhPJ4KxnWYfcUHCeZHTMgRgR4ewD7RhPCBLjlB5kTIjfrIST8d9aIyQznKbwQ9COIvCLaIJjVtiw9zsmKYw6Aq6pwh_2kvjicRKXnHViY7Q6M5sKfWQz4ALvJN6Axh6UEGp4q_NgqQ==&c=I2vB124dNboxdU0ImiJCZ8PqFqXJ-zhl_67iIhXTMEPQzvSZ73Yvjw==&ch=1Sbg1mROtkzEfiyOgwHccxGEGTbEY62cWvI0xSRt5C8luUi1MiC69g==)
Senator Cornyn is relying on you to do your part, friend. He'll be looking for your name on the list of donors. Will you step up now?

You take your pick... The Easy Way : we exceed November's End of Month fundraising goal by $10,000 and coast through the end of the year. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Thankful in Indiana
body:
Yesterday as I gathered with my family for Thanksgiving, I reflected on all we have to be thankful for as Hoosiers and as Republicans. And here in... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-in-indiana?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **_Thankful in Indiana_** Yesterday as I gathered with my family for Thanksgiving, I reflected on all we have to be thankful for as Hoosiers and as Republicans. And here in Indiana, that list is a long one.

I’m thankful for all we’ve achieved together as Hoosiers – a growing economy, record infrastructure and education investments, improving health for Hoosiers, and so much more. I’m thankful for our elected leaders – from **President Trump** to **Vice President Pence** to **Governor Holcomb** to **Lt. Governor Crouch** and the 70 Republican mayors we’ll have serving Hoosiers starting in January. And I’m thankful for you, our Republicans throughout Indiana who help make Indiana the greatest place anywhere to call home.

We’ve got a lot to look ahead to in 2020. But right now, there’s so much to be thankful for in Indiana.

-Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=509641a6ff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Shop Now: Best Black Friday Purchases!_**
As you’re out shopping today for Black Friday, the Indiana Republican Party has you covered for your Christmas gifts:
* **Congress of Counties Registration** – Have a friend or family member who loves politics, wants to get more involved or talks about running for office? Then sign them up to attend [Congress](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=727f137c6a&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ of Counites](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=387477e22b&e=1acd9bb3d6). This two-day training event in downtown Indy on January 31-February 1, 2020, will bring together Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists to learn the campaign skills needed to win in 2020 and beyond. The Early Bird registration rate of just $75 per person expires at the end of the month (then goes up to $100 per person), so make sure that you [register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c6cd7b351&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

* **Indiana GOP Store** – Have a friend or family member who loves campaign swag and wants to support the Indiana Republican Party and Republicans like **President Donald Trump** and **Governor Eric Holcomb** everywhere they go? Then head over to the [Indiana GOP Store](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b28669d472&e=1acd9bb3d6) to check out our latest t-shirts, hats, tumblers, coffee mugs, stickers and more! [Shop now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0f4f08fce6&e=1acd9bb3d6)

body:
**In case you have not heard about it yet, shady special interests have launched a recall campaign against Greg.**

We refuse to stay silent about it, because all Greg did was follow his Constitutional obligation to vote as a Member of the House of Representatives to ensure the integrity of our Democracy.

[**Donate to our RECALL RAPID RESPONSE FUND to help us fight back against this recall »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6Kb_8uhWPTBedWQKIEMw5s6yVwUptgKM-fQ0HLRMlDo=/SSWpKQeIx8EFLORXaJ0QJaJYfaHhWhXT5xWzH_3etQM=?refcode=X_112919_EOM_B&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Defend MN (via tinaforminnesota.com)
subject: What do you say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Can you add a donation before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to support Tina Smith in Minnesota and help bring Democrats one step closer to flipping the Senate? You can donate right here:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191129-defend?refcode=em191129-defend&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

At midnight tomorrow, we'll face one of our most important fundraising deadlines of 2019. And right now, we're falling behind on our grassroots goal.

Our opponent, Jason Lewis, doesn't have this sort of problem. Between his wealthy donors and the dark money groups supporting his candidacy, Lewis will have as much outside money as he needs to win. But we're doing things a little differently.

**Tina didn't get into public service to rub elbows with billionaires.** She got in the fight because someone needed to step up for everyday folks who have been ignored by Washington for far too long. And she won her race last year by relying on as many people like you giving whatever they can to help us win. That's exactly how we plan to win again.

**So, what do you say? Can you spare $10 before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to support Tina and help bring Democrats one step closer to a majority? name: Yang2020
subject: We send a lot of emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We count on you to help us get Andrew in front of every voter we can.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a) Yang Gang --

We send a lot of emails. And we hear you when you respond to each one, either with a contribution or a reply.

We want to let you know how much it means to this movement when you take the time to read and respond to our campaign emails.

Your contributions make up a significant portion of our fundraising -- which means that you, Yang Gang, truly power our ability to get Andrew and our Humanity First values in front of new and wider audiences.

[**This campaign is powered by our grassroots movement, so we count on you to help us get Andrew in front of every voter we can. Can you dig deep right now and put up a contribution of $10 or more so that we hit our $2 million goal by tomorrow night?**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=5&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)
---

---

---
Each time you’ve contributed or shared our message, we’ve grown in big ways. Case in point: none of our ads, airtime, or early state organizing would have been possible without your help, Yang Gang.

You pour your heart, soul, and hard-earned dollars into this campaign daily. And we are eternally grateful for it. We thank you for everything you do. **[And if we keep giving it our all, we’ll go all the way, and the rest of America will thank you, too.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=7&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)**
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=6&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)
---
With your help, we’ll hit this end-of-month goal and get that much closer to sending Andrew to the White House.

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18188?t=14&akid=3828%2E377263%2EsT9D3a)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Black Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Like many of you, my family has so much to be thankful for. Yesterday was a reminder that there are so many in our country who don't have what they need. While we were serving meals at the Raul Jimenez Dinner to ensure that 25,000 San Antonians had a hot meal on Thanksgiving, I was reminded of the people I met on the campaign trail who are doing the same in their hometowns. Like those at **Three Square in Las Vegas** who are ensuring that residents can put food on the table. Or the **YMCA supportive housing campus** that I visited back at the beginning of the month in Des Moines. Today as folks are spending time with family, shopping for sales and recovering from their holidays, we have these communities in need on our minds. [**That 's why we are donating 10% of our proceeds from our online store this Black Friday to support the work these great organizations are doing everyday.**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ea/3eb3e2fc/68696d64/744d5996/236953865/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://store.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+donating+10+of+our&utm_campaign=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday&source=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday") | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ea/3eb3e2fc/68696d64/744d5995/236953865/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://store.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday&source=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday")
---

Thank you so much for being with me during this journey, I hope you'll join me in celebrating the amazing work these organizations do to make sure everyone has a meaningful holiday season.

Many thanks,
Julian Castro

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ea/3eb3e2fc/68696d64/744d5990/236953865/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday&source=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ea/3eb3e2fc/68696d64/744d599f/236953865/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday&source=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ea/3eb3e2fc/68696d64/744d599e/236953865/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday&source=20191129_em_castro_all_black-friday"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Like many of you, my family has so much to be thankful for. Yesterday was a reminder that there are so many in our country who don't have what they need. While we were serving meals at the Raul Jimenez Dinner to ensure that 25,000 San Antonians had a hot meal on Thanksgiving, I was reminded of the people I met on the campaign trail who are doing the same in their hometowns. Like those at Three Square in Las Vegas who are ensuring that residents can put food on the table. Or the YMCA supportive housing campus that I visited back at the beginning of the month in Des Moines. Today as folks are spending time with family, shopping for sales and recovering from their holidays, we have these communities in need on our minds. "" | "" Thank you so much for being with me during this journey, I hope you'll join me in celebrating the amazing work these organizations do to make sure everyone has a meaningful holiday season. Many thanks, Julian Castro "" | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. body:
As you read this note, powerful special interests are organizing in Washington to raise bundles of cash for Cory Gardner. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0fc/984132804/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| I'll make this quick! [**_We have a fundraising deadline tomorrow, so I have to ask directly: Can you make a donation of $26 right now to help us reach our goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191129_MES_20191129-fr-MES-quick-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

While I'm writing you this note, Mitch McConnell's network of powerful special interests is organizing in Washington (yes, even on Black Friday) to funnel millions of dollars of dark money into Colorado to help Cory Gardner hold on to this seat.

By contrast, John's campaign is for the people of Colorado, and it's powered by you chipping in what you can, when you can.

**That means we 're relying on you to help us close the fundraising gap around critical deadlines like this one. So, will you chip in whatever you can before tomorrow at midnight?** Thank you,
M.E.

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191129_MES_20191129-fr-MES-quick-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0fb/984132804/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f8/984132804/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f9/984132804/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f6/984132804/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f7/984132804/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f4/984132804/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0f5/984132804/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142e/691c9bd/6f94c115/11a7d0fb/984132804/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: PLEDGE to vote in 2020!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, We're 11 months until Election Day 2020 \-- the day we can stand up and resoundingly say "NO" to Trump, his racism, xenophobia, misogyny, and corruption. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to showing up to the voting booth and marking blue across the ballot, but we can't be the only ones. Trump's name on the ballot will bring out his base in droves \-- so we need to be prepared to fight back. We need to hear from you \-- if you are ready to see positive change across the country, retake the government from corrupt cronies, and restore democracy, add your name to this pledge. [**Pledge to vote on November 3, 2020 >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdceb/6e9863e8/16d4cf4a/1db0a376/434268904/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/2020-pledge/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdceb/6e9863e8/16d4cf4a/1db0a376/434268904/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/2020-pledge/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Team Monika
subject: Did you see Monika's message to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
If everyone reading this stepped up, we'd make our goal in no time.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d913/7dfbb003/42af80b5/5527bea8/1603784754/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&source=rtw_20191129_em_kicker")
---
Hey friend, did you see Monika's message to you earlier this week?

We are in a tough three-candidate primary, and with new district lines, there are almost sure to be new primary challengers added any day now.

**If we want Monika to be our next representative, we cannot afford to fall behind in our fundraising for this month.** We need to raise $5,000 more by Saturday at midnight, team.

The truth is, if everyone reading this stepped up, we'd make that goal in no time at all. Even $5 makes a HUGE difference!

So can we count on you to help us out? **Here's the link again:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d913/7dfbb003/42af80b5/5527bea9/1603784754/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatemonikajohnson&utm_campaign=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&source=rtw_20191129_em_kicker")**

Thank you--we are SO grateful!!

Team Monika

**\-------- FORWARDED MESSAGE ------------**
From: Monika
Subject line: Three sentences

Hi friend,

I'll be brief: I'm reaching out to you today because my team is telling me we're falling behind in our November fundraising.

Running to serve this community is a joy, and as your representative, I will work tirelessly for the working families like mine right here in North Carolina. But to do that--I need your help.

**I hope you can be fearless with me today and help me achieve our vision of a 2nd District with a leader who serves, first and foremost, with integrity.**

**You can donate using this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d913/7dfbb003/42af80b5/5527beae/1603784754/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatemonikajohnson&utm_campaign=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&source=rtw_20191129_em_kicker")**

Grateful for your support,

Monika
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d913/7dfbb003/42af80b5/5527beaf/1603784754/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191129_em_kicker&source=rtw_20191129_em_kicker")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://monika.bsd.net/unsubscribe.

name: MATCH ALERT (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: MASSIVE threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | We need to move quickly. Republicans just raised $100,000 SPECIFICALLY to take this Senate seat from us. This threat is so dangerous to our chances of flipping the Senate that generous Democrats are now MATCHING gifts to help Ben Ray DEFEND this seat -- _but only until tomorrow 's end-of-month deadline._ | **DEMOCRATIC MATCH: [ACTIVE](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**

_**[Suggested Support: $5>>](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**_
---

If 782 supporters step up for Ben Ray before tomorrow's deadline, he'll WIN this race, HOLD this Senate seat for Democrats, and flip McConnell's ENTIRE Senate!

**This is one of the biggest deadlines Ben Ray has ever faced. He needs us to come to his defense.**

Will you rush $5?

Your generous gift will be emergency-matched -- _but only for the next 24 hours._

| ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b2_mav_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7fa/18e32a7f/501e4fb2/7b22d721/271288950/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7fa/18e32a7f/501e4fb2/7b22d726/271288950/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7fa/18e32a7f/501e4fb2/7b22d727/271288950/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7fa/18e32a7f/501e4fb2/7b22d724/271288950/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. This is one of the biggest deadlines Ben Ray has ever faced. He needs us to come to his defense. Will you rush $5? Your generous gift will be emergency-matched -- but only for the next 24 hours. | **** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** Thank you, Team Ben Ray | "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: Team Ed Markey
subject: ↪️RE: Why we need to keep Ed in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: Did you see this email from earlier today? Ed is leading the grassroots movement to combat the climate crisis, and we need your urgent help.

_**[Our final November deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we're 55% of the way there. Will you chip in $27 or more to stand with Ed to show that our grassroots movement is stronger than ever?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *
>
> Team,
>
> As the wildfires burn, seas rise, and storms devastate every corner of the country, Donald Trump and the Republicans have chosen to do nothing.
>
> **Their inaction is reprehensible.**
>
> That's why I'm fighting every day to pass the Green New Deal. We can combat the climate crisis, transform our economy, and launch the greatest jobs program in a generation with the Green New Deal.
>
> **But I need your help in this fight. We 're facing our final November deadline, and we're only 55% of the way to our $30,000 goal.**
>
> _**[Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us close the gap on our goal before tomorrow at midnight? We need to show grassroots Democrats are standing up and ready to fight to save our planet.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _
>
> _**[Donate $10 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-112919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $27 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-112919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $50 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-112919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $100 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-112919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $250 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-112919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate another amount](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
> Since I introduced the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, we have sparked a political revolution in this country that is going to take power from Big Oil and fossil fuel interests and put it back in the hands of the people.
>
> The Green New deal is about putting people, not polluters, at the center of our country's energy policies.
>
> But if we don't have the resources to stay in this fight, we'll be allowing the climate deniers to win and we abandon future generations. We can't let that happen.
>
> _**[That's why reaching our final November goal is so important. We need to send a clear message that the power of this grassroots movement is stronger than ever. Will you pitch in and stand with me?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-112919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> Thanks,
>
> Ed

| Hi team, I just got the latest update from our team, and I want to share it with you. **Since we launched our big $1.5 million end-of-month goal, we 've raised $1,275,088.10!** This is incredible -- but we can't stop now. Now she wants to continue her career of service in Congress. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
