name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Brett Kavanaugh's about to help Trump dismantle the EPA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In an official statement just this week, Justice Kavanaugh signalled that he would be the Supreme Court's fifth and deciding vote to overturn generations of precedent and dismantle the EPA's ability to regulate corporate pollution. This couldn't come at a more dangerous time. The Supreme Court could gut the EPA's ability to set regulations as early as the next term, which means even if Democrats take back the White House in 2020, we'd also need to hold the House majority and flip the Senate in order to ensure the conservative Court wouldn't overturn the new president's attempts to fight climate change. A recent U.N. report on climate change revealed the devastating likelihood that our inaction has doubled how much the Earth's temperature will rise by the end of the century unless we take immediate action. We need engaged voters to act now: **Will you vote blue to fight climate change?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdced/6e9863e8/16d670a7/1db0a37f/1171098147/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3CXqbbv7") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdced/6e9863e8/16d670a7/1db0a37f/1171098147/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3CXqbbv7") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdced/6e9863e8/16d670a7/1db0a37e/1171098147/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191129c.ND&refcode2=H1wGfud40pxvakN9XxQO")

subject: counting down the hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
| |
---

| | We're counting down the hours, folks. Jordan sent you an email earlier -- forwarded below -- and it's so important that you read it. We have a chance to send Mike, a true warrior for Iowa, to the Senate, but we need your help to reach our end-of-month goal. [**We have $1,517 to go, can you donate before the time runs out?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d17/582274145/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=15") Thank you, Team Franken \--------Forwarded Message--------
From: Jordan Overstreet
Subject: 48 hours
Sent: Friday, November 29, 2019 Well, team, we're already at the end of November and boy did it fly by. We only have less than 48 hours left to hit our monthly finance goal. As it stands now we're $3,171 short of where we need to be by midnight on Saturday. [**Can you help us close the gap with a donation of any size?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d17/582274145/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=15") | [**$5**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d10/582274145/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=5") | **[$35](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d11/582274145/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=35")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d12/582274145/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=50")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d13/582274145/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all?refcode=FILL&amount=100")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d2c/582274145/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=250")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d2d/582274145/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=10")**
**Mike is the best choice to be Iowa 's next senator. Let's go down the list:**
✅He'll protect Medicare and Social Security
✅He'll fight to keep our farmland prosperous and soil healthy
✅He'll take aggressive action on the climate crisis
✅He'll hold powerful people and corporations accountable for their actions
✅He'll put Iowans first
But he needs your help today. We're up against establishment fundraisers, and our only hope of keeping up is by engaging our grassroots team. [**So, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can hit this end-of-month target?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d2e/582274145/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all&amount=5")

[I can give more!](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242a/33365068/4a63976e/3f8b8d2f/582274145/VEsHBA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191129_em_fr_tf_b2_all")

Democratically yours,
Jordan Overstreet

name: Peters, Gary
subject: Winning in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
we'll be done with Mitch McConnell.
| | |
---
Friends,

Our race here in Michigan will decide Senate control, but last quarter, my right-wing opponent broke fundraising records: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell helped him funnel millions into Michigan to defeat me.
I know we're not going to let Mitch McConnell buy Michigan's Senate seat and expand his chokehold on our democracy. We have what it takes to fight back - and with your help, friends, that's exactly what we're going to do.
From where I stand, the importance of taking back the Senate has never been more clear. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.
**If we win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, we'll be done with Mitch McConnell.**

We'll also protect the future of the Supreme Court: That means protecting everything from reproductive freedoms and affordable health care to voting rights and climate change. And that means no more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh.
**I know what Democrats can do if we win.** But our path to victory won't be easy - the polls show me statistically tied with my right-wing opponent.

The good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that the Senate is up for grabs, but we must first win here in Michigan. And just recently, Cook Political Report, an independent election analysis database, increased my likelihood of losing.
**With such razor-thin margins and Senate control on the line, every dollar matters when it comes to winning this race. That's why we set a goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight. And with time running out, we're only 84% of the way to goal.**
Friends - will you pitch in whatever you can afford so we can win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court? Even just $3 will go a long way - you can use this link here: [secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa74c/4072247096/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk147-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa74b/4072247096/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa74a/4072247096/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa749/4072247096/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa748/4072247096/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa74b/4072247096/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa8e/5721a3ed/71d8d6d6/efaa74a/4072247096/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Really important (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | [This is a long email. I really need you to read the entire thing -- and then consider donating $19 to my campaign before tomorrow's End of Month Deadline. >> ](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+This+is+a+long+email+I+really+need+you+t&utm_campaign=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all") At the debates, my message resonated with America. I know why. Like many I have a lot to be thankful for today. My life hasn't always been easy, and I know yours hasn't either. I understand the struggle real people in this country face. I watched my grandmother clean other people's houses for a living. She never got past the 4th grade. She came here from Mexico when she was seven, rolled up her sleeves, and worked 20-hour days to give us a better life. My mom was a single mom. She experienced first-hand that gut-wrenching feeling of not being able to put food on the table when my brother and I were little. I felt guilty when I got sick because it meant that my family would be crushed under bills from the doctor. I know what it feels like to be from an immigrant family, in a neighborhood that doesn't have much privilege. I grew up in one. _**Here is the bottom line -- I get what a lot of American families are going through this Thanksgiving because I 've lived it:**_ I know how much equal pay would have meant for my mom -- that's why I stood up for it at the debates. I see my grandmother in the images of the babies separated from their parents at the border -- that's why I created a humane immigration plan. I see my childhood neighborhood when I go to Flint, Michigan and hear about kids living without drinking water -- that's why I have a plan to eliminate lead poisoning. I see my son and daughter in the faces of children without access to quality education -- that's why I'm fighting for universal pre-K for all. I promise you this: I will always -- always -- fight for you. And I need you to fight for me today. **If you want to keep me in this race and help me build a sustainable campaign that 's in it for the long haul, I need you right now. My End of Month Deadline is in tomorrow, and it's a critically important moment for me.** [Would you please consider rushing in $19 to support me and help me hit my critical End-of-Month Fundraising No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8eb/3eb3e2fc/68716848/744d5b45/3689171202/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8eb/3eb3e2fc/68716848/744d5b44/3689171202/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8eb/3eb3e2fc/68716848/744d5b43/3689171202/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191129_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | "" At the debates, my message resonated with America. I know why. Like many I have a lot to be thankful for today. My life hasn't always been easy, and I know yours hasn't either. I understand the struggle real people in this country face. I watched my grandmother clean other people's houses for a living. She never got past the 4th grade. She came here from Mexico when she was seven, rolled up her sleeves, and worked 20-hour days to give us a better life. My mom was a single mom. She experienced first-hand that gut-wrenching feeling of not being able to put food on the table when my brother and I were little. I felt guilty when I got sick because it meant that my family would be crushed under bills from the doctor. I know what it feels like to be from an immigrant family, in a neighborhood that doesn't have much privilege. I grew up in one. Here is the bottom line -- I get what a lot of American families are going through this Thanksgiving because I 've lived it: I know how much equal pay would have meant for my mom -- that's why I stood up for it at the debates. I see my grandmother in the images of the babies separated from their parents at the border -- that's why I created a humane immigration plan. I see my childhood neighborhood when I go to Flint, Michigan and hear about kids living without drinking water -- that's why I have a plan to eliminate lead poisoning. I see my son and daughter in the faces of children without access to quality education -- that's why I'm fighting for universal pre-K for all. I promise you this: I will always -- always -- fight for you. And I need you to fight for me today. If you want to keep me in this race and help me build a sustainable campaign that 's in it for the long haul, I need you right now. My End of Month Deadline is in tomorrow, and it's a critically important moment for me. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. name: Evelyn Yang
subject: I’m proud to be on your team, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
As president, Andrew will sit and listen to the needs and concerns of all Americans and work hard to improve lives.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H) Yang Gang --

Being on the campaign trail with Andrew and his team gives me the opportunity to experience our American democracy up close and personal.

And the enthusiasm for Andrew and his Humanity First message moves me in ways I can’t describe.

Andrew cares so deeply about the issues that are affecting the American people and the kind of world we’re going to leave our children. That’s why he’s running -- he couldn’t sit by and watch while politicians played with their futures.

As president, he will sit down and listen to the needs and concerns of everyday Americans and work hard to address them.

He’s going to be a wonderful, empathetic, action and results-driven president. **But he needs your help to get there.

[Can you donate $10 now to help Andrew achieve his vision of a Humanity First America? We must hit our goal of $2 million in order to power this campaign to win. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18255?t=5&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H)** | [Donate](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18255?t=7&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H)
---
**I’m proud to be on your team, Yang Gang. Thanks for everything you do.**

Evelyn Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Donate](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18255?t=6&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3830%2E377263%2Ehs2b0H) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
